login.title: Login
login.sub_title: Enter your email below to login to your account
login.privacy_agreement: By clicking continue, you agree to our <div1> Terms of Service </div1> and <div2> Privacy Policy </div2>.

web3.title: Web3 Playground
web3.subtitle: Hands-on examples for wallet, on-chain read/write, signatures, and debugging.
web3.coming_soon: Detailed interactive demo for this module is queued in next phases.
web3.module_explain_1: This module demonstrates the core path for "{title}".
web3.module_explain_2: Each page is designed as a reusable reference with minimal coupling.

messages.rainbow_compare_note: This page demonstrates RainbowKit connect flow for side-by-side comparison with the wagmi-only module.
messages.switch_wallet_hint: Switch account/network in wallet, logs will update here.

wallet-connect.title: Wallet Connect
wallet-connect.summary: Connect/disconnect wallet using project default RainbowKit flow.

wallet-connect-wagmi-only.title: Wallet Connect (Wagmi Only)
wallet-connect-wagmi-only.summary: Connect wallets with wagmi hooks directly, without RainbowKit UI components.

wallet-account.title: Wallet Account
wallet-account.summary: Read account metadata: address, connector, chain id, and status.

watch-account-network.title: Watch Account & Network
watch-account-network.summary: Observe account/network changes and append logs for debugging.

network-switch.title: Network Switch
network-switch.summary: Switch chain and validate if the target chain is supported.

native-balance.title: Native Balance
native-balance.summary: Read native coin balance for connected account.

erc20-balance.title: ERC20 Balance
erc20-balance.summary: Read ERC20 balance for owner address.

erc20-allowance.title: ERC20 Allowance
erc20-allowance.summary: Read allowance(owner, spender) for approval workflows.

contract-read.title: Contract Read
contract-read.summary: General readContract pattern for custom contract methods.

contract-events.title: Contract Events
contract-events.summary: Watch events and query historical logs by block range.

multicall.title: Multicall
multicall.summary: Batch read multiple contracts/functions in a single request.

native-transfer.title: Native Transfer
native-transfer.summary: Send native token transaction and show hash/receipt lifecycle.

erc20-approve.title: ERC20 Approve
erc20-approve.summary: Approve spender amount for token spending.

tx-status.title: Transaction Status
tx-status.summary: Track tx lifecycle: pending, confirmed, failed, replacement.

gas-estimate.title: Gas Estimate
gas-estimate.summary: Compare EIP-1559 and legacy gas estimation strategies.

sign-message.title: Sign Message
sign-message.summary: Sign plain message or SIWE-style payload from connected wallet.

verify-signature.title: Verify Signature
verify-signature.summary: Backend verification with nonce replay protection and context checks.

error-handling.title: Error Handling
error-handling.summary: Map wallet/RPC/contract failures into stable UI error codes and tips.

retry-pattern.title: Retry Pattern
retry-pattern.summary: Prevent duplicate submits and provide safe retry UX.

dev-checklist.title: Dev Checklist
dev-checklist.summary: Checklist for RPC, faucet, ABI, addresses, and test accounts.
